member.name: T:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles user registration and authentication.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.AuthController.Register(TaskManagerAPI.DTOs.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Registers a new user account.
member.param: Registration details: username, email, and password.
member.returns: 201 Created on success, 400 Bad Request if validation fails or user already exists.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.AuthController.Login(TaskManagerAPI.DTOs.LoginDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT Bearer token.
member.returns: 200 OK with JWT token, or 401 Unauthorized if credentials are invalid.

member.name: T:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.TasksController
member.summary: Manages tasks for the authenticated user. All endpoints require a valid JWT Bearer token.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.TasksController.GetUserId
member.summary: Gets the current user's ID from the JWT token claims.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.TasksController.GetAll
member.summary: Returns all tasks belonging to the authenticated user.
member.returns: 200 OK with a list of tasks.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.TasksController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single task by ID. Only returns tasks belonging to the authenticated user.
member.returns: 200 OK with the task, 404 if not found or not owned by the user.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.TasksController.Create(TaskManagerAPI.DTOs.TaskCreateDto)
member.summary: Creates a new task for the authenticated user.
member.param: Task creation data: title, description, priority, and optional due date.
member.returns: 201 Created with the newly created task.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.TasksController.Update(System.Int32,TaskManagerAPI.DTOs.TaskUpdateDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing task. Only the task owner can update it.
member.returns: 200 OK with the updated task, 404 if not found, or 400 if validation fails.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Controllers.TasksController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a task by ID. Only the task owner can delete it.
member.returns: 204 No Content on success, 404 if not found.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Services.IAuthService.RegisterAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a new user. Returns an error message if username/email already exists, or null on success.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Services.IAuthService.LoginAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates credentials and returns a JWT token, or null if credentials are invalid.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Services.ITaskService.GetAllTasksAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets all tasks belonging to the specified user.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Services.ITaskService.GetTaskByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a single task by ID, ensuring it belongs to the specified user.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Services.ITaskService.CreateTaskAsync(TaskManagerAPI.DTOs.TaskCreateDto,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new task for the specified user.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Services.ITaskService.UpdateTaskAsync(System.Int32,TaskManagerAPI.DTOs.TaskUpdateDto,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates an existing task. Returns null if the task is not found or does not belong to the user.

member.name: M:TaskManagerAPI.Services.ITaskService.DeleteTaskAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a task. Returns false if the task is not found or does not belong to the user.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
